vulnerability.reference: Biologically implausible causal priors lead to systematic misinterpretation of diagnostic images under distribution shift.

dose_response.reference: Biologically implausible causal priors in diagnostic AI cause systematic misinterpretation under distribution shifts, leading to misdiagnosis, inappropriate treatments, and eroded patient trust.
